ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "code" TEXT /* University code */,
  "public_private" TEXT /* Type of institution (Public or Private) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the university */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the university */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the university */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum enrollment capacity of the university */,
  "campus_size" REAL /* Size of the university campus in acres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "undergraduate_population" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Total student population */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial aid data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "net_price" REAL /* Net price of attending the university */,
  "average_grant_aid" REAL /* Average grant aid provided */,
  "total_annual_cost" REAL /* Total cost of attendance */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Average scholarship amount awarded */,
  "loan_default_rate" REAL /* Loan default rate percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for alumni salary data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "alumni_salary" REAL /* Average alumni salary after graduation */,
  "mid_career_salary" REAL /* Average mid-career salary (10+ years of experience) */,
  "starting_salary" REAL /* Average starting salary for graduates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_salaries_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceptance_rates" (
  "acceptance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for acceptance rate data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate percentage */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Application fee amount */,
  "early_decision_acceptance_rate" REAL /* Early decision acceptance rate percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceptance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceptance_rates_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for admission test data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "sat_lower" INTEGER /* Lower SAT score threshold */,
  "sat_upper" INTEGER /* Upper SAT score threshold */,
  "act_lower" INTEGER /* Lower ACT score threshold */,
  "act_upper" INTEGER /* Upper ACT score threshold */,
  "test_optional" INTEGER /* Whether SAT/ACT is optional for admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_tests_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for contact information */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number */,
  "mailing_address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Degree level offered (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctoral) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated program */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "faculty_title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  "faculty_email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research grant */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  "grant_source" TEXT /* Source of the grant funding */,
  "grant_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the grant in years */,
  "grant_pi" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_grants_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, staff) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
